channel.title: YouthTICK Blog
channel.description: In-depth articles on Erasmus+, youth participation, sustainability and intercultural dialogue — by the YouthTICK team in Yalova, Türkiye.

item.title: Erasmus+ in Turkey: What Young People Need to Know in 2026
item.description: Turkey has been an Erasmus+ programme country since 2014 — meaning Turkish young people and organisations can participate in the full range of Erasmus+ actions on equal terms with EU member states.
item.dc:creator: Ayşe Kaya

item.title: What Is a Youth Exchange? Everything You Need to Know
item.description: Every year, tens of thousands of young Europeans participate in Erasmus+ youth exchanges — yet most young people outside active NGO circles have never heard of them. This guide answers the most common questions honestly.
item.dc:creator: Kerem Aydın

item.title: How to Apply for Erasmus+: Step-by-Step Guide 2026
item.description: Applying for Erasmus+ can feel overwhelming the first time. Multiple programme types, national agency websites, project forms — this guide walks you through every step.
item.dc:creator: Elif Yıldız

item.title: Youth Participatory Budgeting: A Practical Guide for Youth Organisations
item.description: Participatory budgeting (PB) is a democratic process where community members directly decide how part of a public budget is allocated. This guide explains how to start a youth PB process in your context.
item.dc:creator: YouthTICK Team

item.title: The Erasmus+ Programme 2021–2027: What's New and What Matters
item.description: The current Erasmus+ programme runs from 2021 to 2027 with a record budget of €26.2 billion. Here's what changed from the previous programme and what youth organisations need to know.
item.dc:creator: YouthTICK Team

item.title: How Youth Organisations Can Contribute to the EU Youth Strategy
item.description: The EU Youth Strategy 2019–2027 sets out a framework for youth policy across Europe. This article explains what it means in practice and how small organisations can align with it.
item.dc:creator: YouthTICK Team

item.title: Intercultural Dialogue in Youth Work: Methods That Actually Work
item.description: Intercultural dialogue is a cornerstone of Erasmus+ youth work — but it can easily become superficial. This article reviews the non-formal methods that produce genuine cross-cultural understanding.
item.dc:creator: YouthTICK Team

item.title: Understanding the European Solidarity Corps: A Complete Guide
item.description: The European Solidarity Corps gives young people aged 18–30 the chance to volunteer across Europe — fully funded. This guide explains every strand and how to apply.
item.dc:creator: YouthTICK Team

item.title: The Complete Guide to Your First Erasmus+ Youth Exchange in 2026
item.description: Erasmus+ youth exchanges are one of the most transformative experiences available to young people aged 13–30 in Europe. They are free, EU-funded and create connections that last decades.
item.dc:creator: Elif Yıldız
